note: Safe to run anywhere with gh auth; only writes <repo-root>/.claude/gh-workflow.config.json.

evals.prompt: what conventions does this repo use? set up the workflow config
evals.expected_output: Repo + gh user resolved via gh; PR template and branch/commit conventions detected (not asked); board and Slack asked about only if discoverable candidates are ambiguous/absent, batched in one AskUserQuestion; resolved values written to .claude/gh-workflow.config.json and the user told where it lives.

evals.prompt: run in a repo that has a legacy .claude/work-issue.config.json from an old run
evals.expected_output: read/get fall back to the legacy file; init copies it to gh-workflow.config.json; no values are re-asked.
